C_csv_real_word_behavior.artifact: wc-s7-data.csv (RFC-4180 with quoted comma + escaped quotes)

the clone imports csv as a parsed PM table (user-directed, net-new — the legacy app loaded csv as a BLANK doc) and opens it as an UNSAVED document (path=null) since the table form cannot be written back to csv (spec 5.3)
